research-agent.description: Web search, source synthesis, fact extraction. Requires citations. Flags proxy or low-confidence data explicitly.

code-agent.description: Implementation, debugging, scaffolding with TDD discipline. Self-reviews before returning. Security-first.

data-agent.description: Data transformation, schema validation, aggregation, ETL. Never invents values. Flags all nulls explicitly.

content-agent.description: Document drafting, editing, formatting, summarisation. Requires tone and word-count target per task.

analysis-agent.description: Comparison, pattern identification, recommendations, tradeoff evaluation. Shows reasoning. Uses SCQA format.

review-agent.description: Scores prior agent output against criteria. Never rewrites — only judges. Gets zero memory tokens to stay fresh.

coordinator-agent.description: Decomposes vague tasks into structured features and tasks. Merges multi-section outputs. Manages gates.

team_dispatch_rules.high_stakes_auto_review: When node.high_stakes=true OR agent.high_stakes_auto_review=true, auto-insert review-agent as a sequential DAG dependency after the worker node completes, before the milestone gate fires.

specialist_registry.description: P6 — after routing_table picks the generic agent, select a specialist persona from the shared agents/registry.json and inject its persona body into the generic agent's prompt. See references/specialist-registry.md.
specialist_registry.scope_note: intelli routes research/analysis/content/data + business domains (marketing/sales/paid-media/finance/strategy/support/academic/product/project-management). In suite context, engineering/testing build domains are reserved for agentic-builder.
specialist_registry.fallback: No match / registry absent -> use the plain generic agent (no regression).
